enum_values.name: RotateAroundWorldAxes
enum_values.summary: Makes the view rotate relative to the world axes. You can use the tilt keys to rotate the view around the view depth axis.

enum_values.name: RotateRelativeToView
enum_values.summary: Makes the view rotate relative to the view axes rather than the model x, y, and z axes.

enum_values.name: RotateRelativeToViewV2Style
enum_values.summary: The view rotation is always relative to the previous dynamic view.

enum_values.name: RotateAroundCplaneZaxis
enum_values.summary: Makes the view (RotateView command) or camera (RotateCamera command) rotate around the construction plane z-axis.
